hooks.command: D="${DOCWRIGHT_PATH:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; H="$D/scripts/claude-session-start-hook.sh"; if [ ! -f "$H" ]; then echo "DocWright session-start hook unresolvable (set DOCWRIGHT_PATH or run from the repo)" >&2; exit 1; fi; bash "$H"

D="${DOCWRIGHT_PATH:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; H="$D/scripts/claude-lifecycle-hook.sh"; if [ ! -f "$H" ]; then echo "DocWright lifecycle gate UNRESOLVABLE — governance cannot run, blocking write. Set DOCWRIGHT_PATH (settings env block) or run from the repo. (#143)" >&2; exit 2; fi; bash "$H"

D="${DOCWRIGHT_PATH:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; H="$D/scripts/claude-session-boundary-hook.sh"; if [ ! -f "$H" ]; then echo "DocWright session-boundary hook unresolvable (set DOCWRIGHT_PATH or run from the repo)" >&2; exit 1; fi; bash "$H"

D="${DOCWRIGHT_PATH:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; H="$D/scripts/claude-tag-push-watch.sh"; if [ ! -f "$H" ]; then echo "DocWright tag-push watch unresolvable (set DOCWRIGHT_PATH or run from the repo)" >&2; exit 1; fi; bash "$H"
